title: Pocket Reality Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:Franklin Richards render.png|thumb|right|400px|During the original "Heroes Reborn" event, [[Franklin Richards]] created a pocket universe inside of the ball shown above.]]

==Summary==
'''Pocket Reality Manipulation''' is a power which revolves around manipulating and creating pocket realities. Pocket realities, in this case, refers to realms that are spatially separate from other realms (including universes) and either are of less than universal size on the inside or appear as less than universe sized objects when observed from the outside.

==Possible Uses==
*Traveling between pocket realities and greater realities.
*Altering the internal structure of the pocket reality - usually it means the user is able to control aspects of his/her pocket reality, like manipulating time, or warping reality. Most of the time, it's limited to the boundaries of the pocket reality.
*Manipulating a pocket reality as a unit - basically controlling the pocket reality without being limited to boundaries, allowing the user to shift, merge, cut and destroy pocket realities.
*Enhancing powers from being within pocket realities - various characters can often only achieve their full power in their personal pocket realities.

==Users==
*Daemon Princes, Chaos Gods and various other characters ([[Warhammer 40,000]])
*[[Jedah Dohma]] and others ([[Darkstalkers]])
*Many characters from [[DC Comics]]
*Many characters from [[Marvel Comics]]
*Many characters from [[Supernatural]]
*Meta-Players ([[07th Expansion Series|Umineko no Naku Koro ni]])
*[[Darth Sidious|Palpatine]], [[Abeloth]] and others ([[Star Wars]])
*Many characters from [[Doctor Who]]
